metadata.name: Predictive Asset Maintenance Intelligence Agent Stack
metadata.description: Extends the operational life of critical grid infrastructure and reduces unplanned outages by using AI to continuously monitor asset health and predict failures before they occur — replacing reactive maintenance with intelligent, condition-based interventions across transmission and distribution networks.
features: Asset Sensor Data Aggregation (transformers, switchgear, cables, OH lines)
Anomaly Detection & Health Scoring with remaining-useful-life estimate
Maintenance Work Order Generation in Field Service for above-threshold assets
Resources & Parts Pre-Planning with long-lead procurement triggers
Maintenance Execution & Quality Capture in Power Apps mobile
Asset Register Update — write-back to AMS + ERP fixed-asset register
Asset Lifecycle & Replacement Planning capex pipeline view
benefits: Reduced unplanned failures across transmission and distribution infrastructure
Longer average asset operational life through proactive intervention
Lower total maintenance cost through condition-based scheduling
Lower capital replacement expenditure through better lifecycle management
starters: Show me the highest-risk grid assets for the next 90 days
Run the predictive maintenance pipeline for substation SUB-44
Generate work orders for any asset above a 30% 90-day failure probability
Give me the fleet-level replacement capex pipeline

components.name: predictive_asset_maintenance_intelligence_agent.py
components.description: Extends the operational life of critical grid infrastructure and reduces unplanned outages by using AI to continuously monitor asset health and predict failures before they occur — replacing reactive maintenance with intelligent, condition-based interventions across transmission and distribution networks.

metadata.name: Procurement and Supplier Collaboration Portal Agent Stack
metadata.description: Accelerates procurement cycles and improves supplier performance via AI-assisted bid evaluation, automated approval workflows, and a digital supplier collaboration portal -- covering demand signal through three-way invoice match.
features: Demand signal + requisition creation from maintenance / capital plans
Procurement strategy determination (direct award / mini-comp / open tender)
Supplier portal bid submission with Copilot-assisted Q&A
AI-assisted bid evaluation across price, lead time, quality, sustainability
PO approval + issuance with automated supplier acknowledgement
ASN + delivery tracking with deviation alerting
Three-way match: PO / Goods Receipt / Invoice with payment release
benefits: Faster end-to-end procurement cycle for routine and framework orders
Higher on-time supplier delivery rate for critical network materials
Lower average procurement cost through AI-assisted bid evaluation
Less manual supplier correspondence through automated portal workflows
starters: Recommend a procurement route for this 2 MUSD framework order
Build an RFQ for medium-voltage cable replenishment
Score the bids submitted by these suppliers
Show me suppliers tracking behind their committed delivery schedule

components.name: demand_signal_requisition_agent.py
components.description: Pulls demand from maintenance + capital plans.

components.name: procurement_strategy_agent.py
components.description: Direct award / mini-comp / open tender decision.

components.name: rfq_builder_agent.py
components.description: Builds RFQ + shortlists eligible suppliers.

components.name: supplier_bid_intake_agent.py
components.description: Receives bids + clarification Q&A.

components.name: bid_evaluation_agent.py
components.description: Scores bids across weighted criteria.

components.name: po_approval_issuance_agent.py
components.description: Drafts PO + routes for approval (pending_review).

components.name: delivery_tracking_agent.py
components.description: Tracks ASN + flags deviation vs commitment.

components.name: three_way_match_agent.py
components.description: PO <-> GR <-> Invoice reconciliation.

useCases: Recommend a procurement route for this 2 MUSD framework order
Build an RFQ for medium-voltage cable replenishment
Score the bids submitted by these suppliers
Show me suppliers tracking behind their committed delivery schedule

metadata.name: Field Crew Safety and Work Permit Management Agent Stack
metadata.description: Digitises the end-to-end permit-to-work process to reduce unsafe working conditions, ensure regulatory compliance, and provide real-time crew safety visibility across the field estate.
features: Permit-to-work request capture from a mobile app
Risk Assessment & Method Statement (RAMS) drafted with Copilot Studio
Safety document validation against the asset isolation plan
Staged permit authorisation workflow with digital sign-off
Live isolation confirmation from the Distribution Management System
On-site safety brief and crew acceptance capture
Work completion + permit clearance with personnel and tools check
Permit-cycle audit trail and safety analytics
benefits: Faster permit issue, authorisation and closure vs paper-based process
Real-time visibility of live work activities across the field estate
Reduced permit-related safety risk through automated pre-work checks
Full digital audit trail for every permit
starters: Raise a permit-to-work request for substation SUB-12 transformer overhaul
Validate this risk assessment against the asset isolation plan
Show me all live permits across the field estate right now
Generate the monthly permit-cycle compliance report

components.name: permit_request_capture_agent.py
components.description: Captures permit-to-work request from a mobile form.

components.name: risk_assessment_agent.py
components.description: Drafts a Risk Assessment + Method Statement (RAMS) tailored to asset class and work.

components.name: isolation_plan_validator_agent.py
components.description: Validates the RAMS against the published asset isolation plan.

components.name: permit_authorisation_workflow_agent.py
components.description: Routes the permit through PIC -> AP -> Manager digital sign-off.

components.name: live_isolation_confirmation_agent.py
components.description: Confirms live breaker / disconnector state from the DMS.

components.name: crew_acceptance_agent.py
components.description: Captures on-site safety brief and per-crew acceptance signatures.

components.name: permit_clearance_agent.py
components.description: Closes permit: personnel count + tools accounted + area safe.

components.name: safety_analytics_agent.py
components.description: Aggregates permit-cycle KPIs (cycle time, on-time closure, near-miss).

useCases: Raise a permit-to-work request for substation SUB-12 transformer overhaul
Validate this risk assessment against the asset isolation plan
Show me all live permits across the field estate right now
Generate the monthly permit-cycle compliance report

metadata.name: Payments Operations Excellence Agent Stack
metadata.description: Optimises end-to-end payments processing: reduces exceptions, improves STP rates, and ensures real-time compliance with scheme rules across CHAPS, Faster Payments, SEPA, and SWIFT rails.
features: Payment ingestion + scheme-rule validation across CHAPS / FPS / SEPA / SWIFT
Sanctions screening against OFAC / HMT / EU lists
Exception handling with Copilot-assisted cause analysis + repair playbook
Customer-query resolution with real-time payment status
Payments analytics: volumes, STP rates, scheme-compliance KPIs
benefits: Higher straight-through-processing rate across payment rails
Faster resolution of customer payment queries
starters: Show me today's STP rate by payment rail
Why did this CHAPS payment fail validation?
What is our nostro position reconciliation status?
Track payment reference 12345 and explain its current state

components.name: payment_ingestion_validator_agent.py
components.description: Validates payment against scheme rules (CHAPS / FPS / SEPA / SWIFT).

components.name: sanctions_screening_agent.py
components.description: Screens parties against OFAC / HMT / EU lists.

components.name: payment_exception_repair_agent.py
components.description: Diagnoses payment-failure root cause + repair playbook.

components.name: nostro_reconciliation_agent.py
components.description: Reconciles internal payment-position to nostro statement.

components.name: correspondent_banking_monitor_agent.py
components.description: Monitors correspondent-bank limits + nostro funding.

components.name: pre_release_fraud_scorer_agent.py
components.description: Scores transaction-level fraud risk pre-release.

components.name: payment_status_tracker_agent.py
components.description: Returns lifecycle state of a payment by reference.

components.name: payments_analytics_agent.py
components.description: STP rate, volume, scheme-compliance KPIs by rail.

useCases: Show me today's STP rate by payment rail
Why did this CHAPS payment fail validation?
What is our nostro position reconciliation status?
Track payment reference 12345 and explain its current state
